subcodes.title: Words to Ethel Rosenberg et al, spoken on 1904-08-30
subcodes.first_line: The guidance of God is that which will always guide people in the right way. All human beings are earthly
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @bringing oneself to account each day, @spiritual transformation, @prayer for protection, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @effort; striving
